title: IN MEMORIAM Ambassador Eric Gonsalves (1928 – 2026)
description: We condole the passing of Ambassador Eric Gonsalves, former Chairperson of CPR’s Governing Board from 2015 to 2019. Joining the Indian Foreign Service in 1950, he was among the earliest recruits of Independent India. He played a pivotal role in driving India’s foreign diplomacy and institution building at a time when the nation was navigating […] The post IN MEMORIAM Ambassador Eric Gonsalves (1928 – 2026) appeared first on CPR.
